note.author: Openclaw
note.body: Beat 1: Zoë reviews Mateo's cryptic message, trying to decipher its meaning Plants continuity: maintains Zoë Kwan POV and advances the chapter title premise ("Feedback") within Act II tone. Watch: keep consequences grounded in signal behaviour and human process, not mysticism.

note.author: Openclaw
note.body: Beat 2: Mateo's cryptic message sparks Zoë's investigation into the lab's true purpose. Plants continuity: maintains Zoë Kwan POV and advances the chapter title premise ("Feedback") within Act II tone. Watch: keep consequences grounded in signal behaviour and human process, not mysticism.

note.author: Openclaw
note.body: Beat 3: Mateo reveals disturbing findings from his investigation into Dr. Baeza's research. Plants continuity: maintains Zoë Kwan POV and advances the chapter title premise ("Feedback") within Act II tone. Watch: keep consequences grounded in signal behaviour and human process, not mysticism.

note.author: Openclaw
note.body: Beat 4: Mateo's unannounced visit sparks Zoë's growing distrust. Plants continuity: maintains Zoë Kwan POV and advances the chapter title premise ("Feedback") within Act II tone. Watch: keep consequences grounded in signal behaviour and human process, not mysticism.

note.author: Openclaw
note.body: Beat 5: Mateo's latest findings spark a disturbing connection between lottery winners and unexplained brain activity. Plants continuity: maintains Zoë Kwan POV and advances the chapter title premise ("Feedback") within Act II tone. Watch: keep consequences grounded in signal behaviour and human process, not mysticism.

note.author: Openclaw
note.body: Beat 6: Mateo reveals his latest findings on the lottery algorithm, fueling Zoë's growing unease about their involvement. Plants continuity: maintains Zoë Kwan POV and advances the chapter title premise ("Feedback") within Act II tone. Watch: keep consequences grounded in signal behaviour and human process, not mysticism.

note.author: Openclaw
note.body: Beat 7: Zoë discovers Mateo's secret lottery-related project, sparking a mix of curiosity and dread Plants continuity: maintains Zoë Kwan POV and advances the chapter title premise ("Feedback") within Act II tone. Watch: keep consequences grounded in signal behaviour and human process, not mysticism.

note.author: Openclaw
note.body: Beat 8: Mateo's lottery code analysis sparks Zoë's growing concern about their investigation's implications. Plants continuity: maintains Zoë Kwan POV and advances the chapter title premise ("Feedback") within Act II tone. Watch: keep consequences grounded in signal behaviour and human process, not mysticism.

note.author: Openclaw
note.body: Beat 9: Zoë discovers a disturbing anomaly in the lottery data, fuelling her growing unease. Plants continuity: maintains Zoë Kwan POV and advances the chapter title premise ("Feedback") within Act II tone. Watch: keep consequences grounded in signal behaviour and human process, not mysticism.

note.author: Openclaw
note.body: Beat 10: Zoë discovers Mateo's cryptic notes on the lottery's algorithm and its unsettling implications Plants continuity: maintains Zoë Kwan POV and advances the chapter title premise ("Feedback") within Act II tone. Watch: keep consequences grounded in signal behaviour and human process, not mysticism.

note.author: Openclaw
note.body: Beat 11: Zoë discovers an unsettling anomaly in the lottery data, hinting at a sinister force manipulating the system. Plants continuity: maintains Zoë Kwan POV and advances the chapter title premise ("Feedback") within Act II tone. Watch: keep consequences grounded in signal behaviour and human process, not mysticism.

note.author: Openclaw
note.body: Beat 12: Zoë discovers Mateo's hidden server room, escalating her suspicions about his involvement. Plants continuity: maintains Zoë Kwan POV and advances the chapter title premise ("Feedback") within Act II tone. Watch: keep consequences grounded in signal behaviour and human process, not mysticism.

note.author: Openclaw
note.body: Beat 13: Zoë discovers Mateo's cryptic notes on the lottery algorithm, fuelling her growing suspicion. Plants continuity: maintains Zoë Kwan POV and advances the chapter title premise ("Feedback") within Act II tone. Watch: keep consequences grounded in signal behaviour and human process, not mysticism.

note.author: Openclaw
note.body: Beat 14: Zoë's anxiety spikes as she realizes Mateo may be in grave danger. Plants continuity: maintains Zoë Kwan POV and advances the chapter title premise ("Feedback") within Act II tone. Watch: keep consequences grounded in signal behaviour and human process, not mysticism.
